recommendation: DO NOT add to CS allowlist
evidence: Dated 2016-08-10, before the named-blend lineup begins (2022-03-01). Every PROTECT/FLOW/EASE/CALM/BALANCE/ALZ COA is dated on or after that date, and every "Purity <descriptor>" COA is dated before it. The two naming schemes do not overlap by a single record, which is the signature of a product-line rename rather than a mapping gap.
why_backfill_missed_it: The backfill requires a blend key or a declared product-map alias in the sample name. This name contains neither — it names a product that predates the blend lineup and has no entry in product-map.json. The rule behaved correctly.
